examples: Gen Bruno de Bourdoncle de Saint-Salvy, French naval commander in the Indian Ocean, said the plane had come down about 15km (eight nautical miles) north of the Comoran coast.
Gen Bruno de Bourdoncle de Saint-Salvy, French naval commander in the indian Ocean, said the plane had come down about 15km (eight nautical miles) north of the Comoran coast.

The only real difference in the two stories, besides the relative insignificance of the Comoros, is that the French decided the deposed Comoran president, Mr. Siad Mohamed Djohar, was too unpopular.
